title: Wireframe Component
description: A UI component within a wireframe design, representing a structural element such as a button, input field, navigation bar, or content block.

name.description: The name of the component (e.g., Primary Button, Navigation Bar, Hero Section).

fidelity.description: The level of visual detail in the wireframe component.

position.description: The x/y position of the component on the wireframe canvas.

dimensions.description: The width and height of the component in pixels.

annotations.description: Notes and explanations attached to this component.

interactive.description: Whether this component has interactive states or prototype links.

linkedScreen.description: The ID of another screen this component navigates to when clicked.

designToken.description: Reference to a design token applied to this component.
